strengths: Hands-on cloud experience (GCP, BigQuery, GCS, AWS)
Production ELT pipelines with Airflow and dbt
weaknesses: Limited mention of data lake implementations
improvement_bullets: Led data platform architecture initiatives, focusing on modernization efforts and establishing organizational standards for cloud-based technologies and data lake solutions, aligning with the Lead Data Engineer (Databricks) role.

Developed and scaled data solutions utilizing Python and cloud-based technologies (GCP, AWS), integrating with AI/ML product teams by transforming raw data into structured, clean datasets to support feature development.
Defined and implemented data modeling architecture and standards, including dimensional modeling with dbt, ensuring robust data governance and data quality validation through Great Expectations.
Managed and mentored junior engineers on best practices for data engineering, cloud technologies, and data platform development, fostering a collaborative and high-performing team environment.

Spearheaded the design and implementation of a production-grade ELT pipeline leveraging Databricks (simulated through BigQuery and Snowflake experience), ingesting Federal Reserve economic data, and establishing CI/CD through GitHub Actions.
cover_letter:
Justin Miller
October 26, 2023

Hiring Manager
Mitchell Martin Inc.

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Lead Data Engineer (Databricks) position at Mitchell Martin Inc. With my background in building robust data platforms, scaling cloud-based solutions, and driving operational efficiency through data, I am confident I would be a strong addition to your team.

I am particularly drawn to Mitchell Martin Inc.'s commitment to innovation in data solutions and believe my experience in modernizing data platforms aligns perfectly with the high-visibility nature of this role.

In my previous roles, I have built and managed data infrastructure that directly supported business objectives, such as creating a business intelligence reporting system that drove a 40% improvement in operational efficiency. Additionally, I have extensive experience in developing production-grade ELT pipelines, most notably with Python, Airflow, and dbt, which directly aligns with your need for scaling data solutions using cloud-based technologies.

I have a proven track record in defining data modeling architecture and standards, including dimensional modeling with star schemas and fact/dimension tables, and I am adept at establishing governance for data flow standards through comprehensive data quality validation using tools like Great Expectations. My experience extends to cloud ecosystems like Google Cloud Platform (BigQuery, GCS) and AWS, and I have successfully implemented CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, demonstrating my ability to build comprehensive data solutions.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background aligns with your team's goals and how I can contribute to your data platform architecture initiatives. Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,
Justin Miller
